testcase.name: PDF Searcher Document Workflow › should complete basic document upload workflow

failure.message: document-workflow.spec.ts:14:7 should complete basic document upload workflow

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › document-workflow.spec.ts:14:7 › PDF Searcher Document Workflow › should complete basic document upload workflow
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('[data-testid="dashboard"]') Expected: visible Received: <element(s) not found> Timeout: 10000ms
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 10000ms - waiting for locator('[data-testid="dashboard"]')
22 | // Wait for dashboard to load after OAuth redirect 23 | // In a real test environment, this would require OAuth mock or test credentials > 24 | await expect(page.locator('[data-testid="dashboard"]')).toBeVisible({ timeout: 10000 }) | ^ 25 | 26 | // Step 2: Upload form is already visible on dashboard 27 | await expect(page.locator('[data-testid="upload-form"]')).toBeVisible() at /Users/macbookpro/Desktop/pdf-ai-assistant/tests/e2e/document-workflow.spec.ts:24:61
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/document-workflow-PDF-Sear-98f66-ic-document-upload-workflow-chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
